description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a rectangular lot, surrounded by a wooden fence and landscaped with several trees and shrubs. The structure features a flat or low-pitched roof, large windows, and a driveway leading to a garage on one side. The backyard includes a small swimming pool, a patio area with outdoor seating, and a green lawn. The front yard is landscaped with grass and trees, and a paved walkway leads to the main entrance. The exterior walls are light-colored, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the roof appears to be finished with a smooth material. The overall design is modern and open, with clear separation between indoor and outdoor living spaces.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped front and back yards, a driveway, garage, and backyard pool.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard pool, patio area, and the length of the wooden fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, pool, patio, and rear facade of the bungalow.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway exit, side yard, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows on multiple facades
